config.Lake.name: Farm lake
config.Lake.description: Replaces the scattered farm ponds with a large lake tucked into the bottom corner
config.WoodsShortcut.name: Secret Woods shortcut
config.WoodsShortcut.description: Adds a shortcut to the Secret Woods, blocked by a hardwood log like the main entrance
config.ForestFish.name: Forest Fish
config.ForestFish.description: Changes fishing spawns to match Cindersnap Foreset, rather than the standard Forest Farm (ie: less trash)
config.GrassyFields.name: Grassy fields
config.GrassyFields.description: Replaces most dirt with tillable grass, and darkens existing (non-tillable) grass
